nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy. Low around 74, with temperatures rising to around 76 overnight. East wind around 8 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers between 1pm and 4pm, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 4pm and 5pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 93. East southeast wind around 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Clear
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7pm. Mostly clear. Low around 75, with temperatures rising to around 77 overnight. South southeast wind around 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 100. Heat index values as high as 107. South southwest wind 7 to 10 mph.
